name: command-center-demo
description: Command Center — analytics dashboard demo (Home + Expenses). Seeded sample data, no external services required.

scripts.dev: concurrently "node --watch server/index.js" "cd client && npm run dev"
scripts.build: cd client && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:pages: node tools/gen-static-data.js && cd client && npm install && VITE_DEMO_STATIC=1 vite build
